up.method: specific uptake rate calculated from measured glucose consumption + OD600 biomass; value shown only in Figure 1 (not numerically in text)

sec.method: specific xanthan production rate from gravimetric yield (dried precipitate); value shown only in Figure 1 (not numerically in text)
time-course metabolite profiling of complex-medium supernatant (Figure 1); numeric value not in text

yields.note: xanthan gum yield measured gravimetrically (dried at 60C, weighed); numeric value not stated in text

growth_records.cite: Koduru, Lokanand et al. Genome-scale metabolic reconstruction and in silico analysis of the rice leaf blight pathogen, Xanthomonas oryzae. Molecular Plant Pathology (2020). DOI:10.1111/mpp.12914. [PMC7060145]
growth_records.snippet: the specific uptake rates of glucose and other complex medium components were calculated along with the specific xanthan production rate (Figure 1a-d) and used to simulate the in silico growth of Xoo during the exponential phase (time inter
growth_records.notes: EXPERIMENTAL data confirmed present but NUMERIC VALUES are only in Figure 1 (panels a-e), not stated in the article text/tables, so exact rates cannot be transcribed without inventing numbers. Measured quantities: batch growth (OD600), glucose consumption, xanthan production, plus lactate/myo-inositol/amino-acid profiles in complex medium; two experimentally measured specific growth rates for exponential-phase intervals 12-18 h and 18-30 h were used to validate model iXOO673 (Fig 1e). Culture: modified glucose medium, 28 C, 200 rpm, batch. pH not stated. Rate placeholders left null per no-invention rule; harvest exact values from Figure 1 (MPP-21-527-g001.jpg) if figure digitization is later performed.
